mapper.select: select id as chunk_id, chunk_index, chapter_path, page_no, chunk_type, content, char_count, vector_id, vector_status, coalesce(is_edited, 0) as is_edited from km_document_chunk where doc_id = #{docId} and is_active = 1 order by chunk_index asc
select c.id as chunkId, c.doc_id as docId, d.kb_id as kbId, c.content from km_document_chunk c join km_document d on d.id = c.doc_id where c.id = #{chunkId} and c.is_active = 1
mapper.update: update km_document_chunk set content = #{content}, char_count = #{charCount}, is_edited = 1, vector_status = 'PENDING', updated_at = now() where id = #{chunkId} and is_active = 1
